inputs.description:
Read docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-28-auth-plan-b-frontend.md — Task 2. Create frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx — login form (username + password + Login button) + "or" divider + "Continue as Guest" button. On login success, call fetchMe and navigate to /. On guest, navigate to /network. Show error messages. Use EXACT code from plan.

Verify: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
Commit: git add frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx && git commit -m "feat: add Login page with username/password and guest option"
